prose.en: Review and resolve input validation errors within {param:si-10.2_prm_1}.

guidance.en: Resolution of input validation errors includes correcting systemic causes of errors and resubmitting transactions with corrected input. Input validation errors are those related to the information inputs defined by the organization in the base control ( SI-10).

prose.en: input validation errors are reviewed within {param:si-10.02_odp.01};
input validation errors are resolved within {param:si-10.02_odp.02}.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
review records of information input validation errors and resulting resolutions
information input validation error logs or records
Organizational personnel responsible for information input validation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Organizational processes for the review and resolution of input validation errors
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing the review and resolution of input validation errors

guidelines.en: the time period within which input validation errors are to be reviewed is defined;
the time period within which input validation errors are to be resolved is defined;
